title: Change website name to Crown Followers

requirements.text: Update the website name to 'Crown Followers' in the browser tab title (index.html <title> tag) and in all places it currently appears on the page, including the Header logo/brand text and Footer brand name.

quotes: I have change me website name
No only change tha name ok

acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab displays 'Crown Followers' as the page title
The Header component logo/brand text reads 'Crown Followers'
The Footer component brand name reads 'Crown Followers'
No other content, styling, or functionality is changed

constraints: Only change the name text — do not alter colors, layout, theme, or any other content
nonGoals: Changing website theme or branding colors
Adding a new logo or icon
Modifying any pricing data or services
